description: Git MCP Server tool definitions (reference only — NOT passed to model at inference time). These schemas define the simplified model output format; the MCP client bridge translates to full server format by injecting repo_path from config.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the working tree status of the git repository.

tools.name: git_diff_staged
tools.description: Show changes that are staged for the next commit.

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Record staged changes to the repository with a commit message.

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show the commit history of the repository.

max_count.description: Maximum number of commits to show

tools.name: git_branch
tools.description: List all branches in the repository.

tools.name: git_create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch in the repository.

base_branch.description: Branch to create from (defaults to current branch)
